stepAnswer: Dataset A: True, Dataset B: True, Dataset C: False, Dataset D: False
stepBody: Sara applies PCA to each of the four datasets above. Which of the datasets have a PC2 vector of approximately:\n$$\begin{pmatrix}\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\\\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\end{pmatrix}$$
choices: Dataset A: True, Dataset B: False, Dataset C: True, Dataset D: False
Dataset A: True, Dataset B: True, Dataset C: False, Dataset D: False
Dataset A: False, Dataset B: False, Dataset C: True, Dataset D: True
Dataset A: False, Dataset B: True, Dataset C: False, Dataset D: True
